mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.app_code, a.app_name, a.app_icon, a.app_desc, a.app_url, a.visible_type, a.status, a.sort_no, a.show_menu, a.show_header, a.enable_watermark, a.client_id, a.client_secret, a.org_id, a.org_name, a.create_by, a.create_name, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_name, a.update_time, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.sort_no AS group_sort_no, r.sort_no AS app_sort_no FROM app_info a LEFT JOIN app_group_relation r ON r.app_code = a.app_code LEFT JOIN app_group g ON g.group_code = r.group_code AND g.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE a.status = 'ENABLED' AND ( a.visible_type = 'ALL' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_role ur WHERE ur.app_code = a.app_code AND ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 'ENABLED' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_admin aa WHERE aa.app_code = a.app_code AND aa.user_id = #{userId} AND aa.status = 'ENABLED' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_admin ba WHERE ba.app_code = a.app_code AND ba.user_id = #{userId} AND ba.status = 'ENABLED' ) ) ORDER BY g.sort_no ASC, r.sort_no ASC
